Appearances:
Plaintiff Vinch Nguyen and Trong Nguyen are present.
Attorney Jesse Ortiz appearing for plaintiffs.
Defendant Rutilio Rivas is present.
Attorney Jason Truong appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of OCT-28-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
